nodes.name: Black-fronted fig parrot
nodes.summary: The black-fronted fig parrot (Nannopsittacus nigrifrons) is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It is found in northern New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. Subspecies Two subspecies are recognised: N. n. nigrifrons (Reichenow, A, 1891) – northern New Guinea N. n. amabilis (Reichenow, A, 1891) – northeastern New Guinea References
